name: codex-plugin-kimi
description: Run Kimi Code review workflows from inside Codex CLI sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Kimi Code review from inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use Kimi Code as an external read-only reviewer from Codex. Provides setup checks, quick review, adversarial review, elite/deep/security review prompts, folder review, and background job management.
defaultPrompt: Review the current Codex-generated changes with Kimi Code.
Run a security-focused Kimi review on the current diff.
Run a deep adversarial Kimi review in the background.
